releaseNotes:
- Fixed slideshow stalling when a photo fails to load
- Added night/dim schedule: set a time window and brightness from the admin page
- Added configurable slide duration (seconds per photo)
- Added OTA updates: future updates can be installed directly from the admin page
- Fixed screen locking after extended idle time (foreground service + keyguard bypass)
- Performance: faster app start (thumbnail cache no longer wiped on boot)
- Performance: metadata cache saves on a background thread
- Security: 50 MB upload size limit, validated settings fields, safe JSON building
